question: Which business segment of JnJ will be treated as a discontinued operation from August 30, 2023 onward?
gold_answer: The Consumer Health business segment will be treated as a discontinued operation from August 30, 2023 onward.
predicted: The Consumer Health business segment will be treated as a discontinued operation from August 30, 2023 onward. This business was separated as Kenvue Inc. through an exchange offer completed on August 30, 2023.
reasoning: The question asks which business segment of J&J will be treated as a discontinued operation from August 30, 2023 onward. Looking at page 4, the press release clearly states: 'As a result of the completion of the exchange offer, Johnson & Johnson will now present its Consumer Health business financial results as discontinued operations, including a gain of approximately $20 billion in the third quarter of 2023.' This directly answers the question - the Consumer Health business is the segment being treated as a discontinued operation from August 30, 2023 onward. This is also consistent with the earlier mention on page 2 that the Kenvue Separation was completed on August 30, 2023, and page 4 notes that Kenvue Inc. was 'formerly Johnson & Johnson's Consumer Health business.'
label: AL
